query:
SELECT id, entity, status, row_count, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, NOW()) as elapsed_min, error_message FROM sync_logs WHERE section='ff365' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 12;
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_pt, SUM(CASE WHEN created_by IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cb, SUM(CASE WHEN updated_by IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ub FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT id, entity, status, row_count, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, NOW()) as elapsed_min, error_message FROM sync_logs WHERE section='ff365' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 12;
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_pt, SUM(CASE WHEN created_by IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cb, SUM(CASE WHEN updated_by IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ub FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section;
